body.title: Installer stage 3: env_sync.py multi-file load + migration 002
body.result: env_sync.py: _cfg_files() + updated boot_env_sync() to load split cfg files with .env fallback. migration_002 added to installer.py. 1868 tests pass.
body.description: Update env_sync.py (MEDIUM inertia) boot_env_sync() to load ordered cfg files instead of single .env. Add migration 002: rename .env → .env.backup-pre-d319, write 002.done. Fallback: warn+load .env if cfg files missing.
